Package com.icarus.events

package com.icarus.events
  • Class
    Description
    AdministratorDashboardActivity
    Provides the administrator dashboard for managing application data.
    AdministratorDashboardEventArrayAdapter
    ArrayAdapter used in the administrator dashboard to display events in a ListView.
    AdministratorDashboardEventArrayAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for the event list items.
    AdministratorDashboardImageArrayAdapter
    Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display images in a ListView.
    AdministratorDashboardNotificationArrayAdapter
    Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display notifications in a ListView.
    AdministratorDashboardTest
    Instrumented UI tests for AdministratorDashboardActivity.
    AdministratorDashboardUserArrayAdapter
    Adapter used in the administrator dashboard to display users in a ListView.
    Comment
    Model representing a comment associated with an event.
    EntrantEventListActivity
    Activity that displays the list of available events for entrants.
    EntrantEventListArrayAdapter
    Adapter used to display events in the entrant event list.
    EntrantEventListArrayAdapter.OnItemClickListener
    Listener interface for handling clicks on event list items.
    EntrantEventListArrayAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder that stores references to the views for a single event item.
    EntrantEventListTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EntrantEventListActivity.
    EntrantMapActivity
    Activity that displays a map of where entrant have joined the event from.
    EntrantMapTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EntrantMapActivity.
    EntrantWaitlistTest
    Instrumented integration tests for entrant waitlist actions.
    Event
    Represents an event in the application.
    EventCommentActivity
    Activity for displaying and managing comments associated with a specific event.
    EventCommentAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter for rendering and managing a list of Comment items.
    EventCommentAdapter.OnSelectionChangedListener
    Callback interface for selection state changes.
    EventCommentTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EventCommentActivity and EventCommentAdapter.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Activity for displaying and managing detailed information about a single event.
    EventDetailsAdapter
    RecyclerView adapter that displays labeled event details.
    EventDetailsAdapter.ViewHolder
    ViewHolder for a single event detail row.
    EventDetailsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EventDetailsActivity.
    EventField
    Represents a single field of an Event, with a name and value.
    EventHistoryActivity
    Activity that displays the event history for the current user.
    EventHistoryListArrayAdapter
    Adapter used to display a user's event history in a ListView.
    EventHistoryTest
    Instrumented UI tests for EventHistoryActivity.
    EventNotificationsActivity
    Activity for viewing all notifications sent for a specific event.
    EventStatusBackgroundWorker
    Worker Class that moves users from "selected" to "rejected" after a event's registration close date has pasted
    ExampleUnitTest
    Example local unit test, which will execute on the development machine (host).
    FirestoreCollections
    Utility class that manages the names of Firestore collections used throughout the application.
    HeaderNavBarActivity
    Base activity that provides a reusable header and bottom navigation bar.
    Image
    Represents an image in the application.
    MainActivity
    Entry activity for the application.
    NotificationFirebaseMessagingService
    Service that handles incoming Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) messages.
    NotificationHelper
    Helper class for managing Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) operations.
    NotificationHelper.OnTokenReceivedListener
    Interface definition for a callback to be invoked when an FCM token is received.
    NotificationItem
    Represents a notification item and manages the dispatching of notifications to users.
    NotificationListAdapter
    Custom adapter for displaying a list of notification items in a ListView.
    OraganizerEntrantViewListArrayAdapter
    Entrant Array Adapter.
    OrganizerCreateEventActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to create a new event.
    OrganizerCreateEventTest
    Comprehensive instrumented UI tests for OrganizerCreateEventActivity.
    OrganizerEntrantSearchActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to view the entrants they can invite to a private event or to add as a Co-Organizer.
    OrganizerInviteNotificationsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for invitation-specific notifications.
    OrganizerManageEventActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to manage a event.
    OrganizerManageEventTest
    Instrumented UI tests for OrganizerManageEventActivity.
    OrganizerSampleNotificationsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for the lottery sampling and notification system.
    OrganizerViewEntrantsOnWaitingListActivity
    Activity that allows organizers to view the entrants on the waiting, selected, rejected, and registered list .
    OrganizerViewEntrantsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for OrganizerViewEntrantsOnWaitingListActivity.
    QRCodeActivity
    Activity responsible for scanning QR codes and navigating to the corresponding event.
    QRCodeScanTest
     
    SampleAttendeesActivity
    Activity that allows an organizer to randomly sample attendees from the event entrants subcollection.
    User
    Represents a user in the application.
    UserNotificationsActivity
    Activity for users to view notifications.
    UserProfileActivity
    Activity that allows a user to view and update their profile information.
    UserProfileTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserProfileActivity.
    UserRegistrationActivity
    Activity that allows a new user to register in the application.
    UserRegistrationTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserRegistrationActivity.
    UserSession
    Singleton class for storing the currently logged-in user across the app session.
    UserSettingsActivity
    Screen for users to manage personal settings and account deletion.
    UserSettingsTest
    Instrumented UI tests for UserSettingsActivity.
